thought.text:
I used browser tools to visit https://example.com and retrieved the page title.

The exact page title is: "Example Domain"

This was accomplished using the browserbase_stagehand_navigate tool to open the website, followed by the browserbase_stagehand_extract tool to specifically extract the page title.

action.message: I used browser tools to visit https://example.com and retrieved the exact page title, which is "Example Domain".

tool_call.name: finish
tool_call.arguments: {"message":"I used browser tools to visit https://example.com and retrieved the exact page title, which is \"Example Domain\".","summary":"Retrieved page title \"Example Domain\" from https://example.com using browser tools"}

summary: Retrieved page title "Example Domain" from https://example.com using browser tools
